title: ischaemum longipilum
intro: Ischaemum longipilum, also known as the Blue Grass or Wild Blue Grass, is a perennial grass species native to India and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ischaemum longipilum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Ischaemum longipilum can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, and is often used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine systems.
